title: openpouch upgrade result
description: `openpouch upgrade --plan <name> --json` / MCP `openpouch_upgrade` (0.3.0+). Payment is deliberately a HUMAN moment: the agent only relays `checkoutUrl`; the human pays in the browser at the Merchant of Record and the account tier updates via signed webhook (verify with whoami). Contract: `required` guaranteed, additive evolution.

plan.description: The paid tier the checkout is for (e.g. starter, pro, scale, business).

founderPricing.description: true = this account is in the founder cohort and checks out at launch prices.

checkoutUrl.description: Hosted-checkout URL — hand it to the human; agents never pay.

humanAction.description: Plain-language instruction for the human step.
